'''Mimbanites''' were one of the native races of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]].

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Mimb.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A Mimbanite licking alcoholic liquid off the floor.]]
Like the Coway, Mimbanites were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with short fur, but they were smaller and less robust. Their fur was green rather than red, hence the derogatory nickname '''Greenies'''.<ref name="Splinter" /> (This derogatory term was also applied toward [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]].)<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

The term "Mimbanite" also refers to a race of furry quadrupeds which inhabited the planet. It is unclear if the quadrupeds were sentient, non-sentient, or semi-sentient.<ref name="Splinter" />

==History==
Unwilling or unable to retreat to caves deep in the swamplands like their cousins, the [[Coway]], when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] set up their mining operations, Mimbanites were reduced to scavenging garbage heaps and begging for [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]]. This once proud race was held in contempt by the Imperial troops and miners.<ref name="Splinter" />

{{Species-stub}}
